outlook.volatilityExpectation: Stable and suppressed volatility expected due to strongly positive cumulative GEX.
outlook.summary: Market makers are heavily long gamma across all expiries, indicating a regime of suppressed volatility. Price is trapped below a massive triple-expiry Call Wall at 26700. The primary directional magnet is the 0DTE Max Pain at 26150, suggesting a gravitational pull lower despite bullish short-term skew.

Highest 0DTE Put OI (622) creates a structural dealer support floor, limiting severe downside moves.
